scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "gateway,auth,customer,order,payment,product,promotion,staff" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgRed.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgGray.bold" "npm --prefix api-gateway run dev" "npm --prefix auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix customer-service run dev" "npm --prefix order-service run dev" "npm --prefix payment-service run dev" "npm --prefix product-service run dev" "npm --prefix promotion-service run dev" "npm --prefix staff-service run dev"
